channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Federal immigration officers involved in fatal shooting in Maine
item.description: An Immigration and Customs Enforcement agent was involved in a shooting Monday morning in Biddeford, Maine, according to federal authorities.

item.title: Trump says U.S. will 'keep' Strait of Hormuz, impose 20% cargo fee
item.description: President Trump says the U.S. will likely control the Strait of Hormuz, as tensions with Iran over the strategic waterway escalate.

item.title: ICE agent fatally shoots driver in Maine, senator reports
item.description: Maine Sen. Angus King said he told Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin that he wants a transparent investigation into the shooting.

item.title: WATCH: World Cup Final Four set
item.description: For the first time in World Cup history, the top four teams in FIFA's rankings have reached the semi-finals.
